title: Landing Page Social Trading
body: Development of a *Landing Page* according to the design provided by the client. Made under *WordPress* since the development required a private part under registration for which I used the *WP-Members* pugin. *Responsive* layout with *Bootstrap 4* from a CDN. Videos on a Vimeo Pro account. Development time: 1 week. [**ayondosocialtrading.com**](http://ayondosocialtrading.com/)
